label: Transparent Shiitake motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a shiitake mushroom cap motif, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: One accurate shiitake mushroom with a rich chestnut-brown convex cap, subtle bark-like speckles and radial cap texture, cream gills visible along the underside edge, a short ivory stem, natural edible mushroom form, practical food-system mood, no oak log prop.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full cap and stem without cropping; three-quarter angle so the brown cap and cream gill edge are both visible.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves edible mushroom texture, warm brown cap, cream gills, bark-toned shadows, and tactile fungal surface detail.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Keep the subject fully separated from the background with crisp edges and generous padding. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no plate, no knife, no vegetables, no oak log, no forest background, no decorative background, no second mushroom, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Shiitake light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Shiitake", derived from a shiitake mushroom cap motif grown on oak log. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible practical food system.
Reference motif: chestnut-brown shiitake cap with bark-like speckles and radial texture, warm cream gills, ivory stem, oak-log bark context, practical food operations mood.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 landscape board, 3840x2160 feel, crisp readable labels, product UI grid, not square and not portrait.
Required visible sections: Morphous Shiitake, Shiitake Cap, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Generated Assets.
Palette direction: use only motif-derived colors and near-neutrals from shiitake cap, cream gills, oak bark, gill shadow, mycelium cream, toasted umber, and damp log charcoal. No unrelated colors.
Typography: practical English product UI guidance plus Japanese typography guidance; use labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric. Include short Japanese UI labels such as 在庫, 仕入, 検索, 承認.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, top navigation, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, inventory table, supplier table, command palette, search filters, empty state, loading state, error state, success state, warning state, toast, pagination, and simple line icons.
Token coverage: shadcn/tweakcn semantic color roles, chart tokens, sidebar tokens, border, input, ring, spacing scale, 8px radius family, shadow scale, texture swatches, focus states, hover states, disabled states, and component density notes.
Style: restrained practical food-system design system, warm cream surfaces, shiitake-brown primary actions, oak-bark structure, cream-gill highlights, subtle radial cap and bark texture, precise 8px grid, 8px card radius, compact dashboards for procurement, batch status, inventory, and kitchen/production workflows.
Text: short readable interface labels only; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no beige-only palette, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Shiitake", no tiny illegible paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Shiitake dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Shiitake". It must feel like the same practical food system translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the shiitake mushroom cap motif grown on oak log.
Reference motif: chestnut-brown shiitake cap with bark-like speckles and radial texture, warm cream gills, ivory stem, oak-log bark context, practical food operations mood.
Reference light-board system details to preserve: shiitake-brown primary controls, cream-gill highlights, warm mycelium neutral surfaces, oak-bark structure, damp log charcoal foreground, precise procurement dashboard/data/forms/table/search/status/token coverage, English and Japanese typography guidance.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 landscape board, 3840x2160 feel, crisp readable labels, precise product UI grid, not square and not portrait.
Required visible sections: Morphous Shiitake, Dark Mode, Shiitake Cap, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Generated Assets.
Palette direction: use only motif-derived colors and near-neutrals from shiitake cap, cream gills, oak bark, gill shadow, mycelium cream, toasted umber, and damp log charcoal. No unrelated colors.
Typography: practical English product UI guidance plus Japanese typography guidance; use labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric. Include short Japanese UI labels such as 在庫, 仕入, 検索, 承認.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, top navigation, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, inventory table, supplier table, command palette, search filters, empty state, loading state, error state, success state, warning state, toast, pagination, and simple line icons.
Token coverage: shadcn/tweakcn semantic color roles, chart tokens, sidebar tokens, border, input, ring, spacing scale, 8px radius family, shadow scale, texture swatches, focus states, hover states, disabled states, and component density notes.
Visual details: dark background derived from damp log charcoal and cap deep brown, elevated panels in toasted umber and bark brown, cream-gill foreground text, mycelium muted labels, shiitake-brown primary actions, oak-bark focus rings, subtle radial cap and bark texture overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls, restrained contrast.
Text: short readable interface labels only; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure flat black background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Shiitake", no tiny illegible paragraphs.
